title: 🔵 Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
description: Global event weekend. Gameplay runs 10:00 AM–7:00 PM local time on July 11 and July 12. Stored as an all-day banner so it does not block the hourly calendar grid.

title: 🟢 Nickit Community Day
